name: Dream Mirror Hypnagogia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>現</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うつつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Choose 1 "Dream Mirror of Joy" and 1 "Dream Mirror of Terror" from your hand and/or Deck, and place 1 in your Field Zone and the other in your opponent's Field Zone, face-up. You can only activate 1 "Dream Mirror Hypnagogia" per turn.
eff: Choose 1 "Dream Mirror of Joy" and 1 "Dream Mirror of Terror" from your hand and/or Deck, and place 1 in your Field Zone and the other in your opponent's Field Zone, face-up. You can only activate 1 "Dream Mirror Hypnagogia" per turn.

action: Places cards from your hand in your Field Zone
Places cards from your hand in your opponent's Field Zone
Places cards from your Deck in your Field Zone
Places cards from your Deck in your opponent's Field Zone
